TYPES.FPCLINE: * I/E-number : last no needs to mentioned *
* Description : VTEXT is extended because the German translation was *
*& T Y P E S D E C L A R A T I O N
kbetr(20) TYPE c, "Rate (condition amount or percentag
koein TYPE koein, "Rate unit (currency, sales unit, or %)
*& T A B L E T Y P E S D E C L A R A T I O N
tt_itemprint type standard table of ty_itemprint,
tt_conditions TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_conditions ,
tt_payment TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_payment,
tt_shipment TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_payment.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: * I/E-number : last no needs to mentioned *
* Description : Change of tax code from I1 to I2 *
* Description : In relation to the Geo Expansion Project some changes *
* had to be made. And also the translations had *
* Description : In relation to the Geo Expansion Project some changes *
* had to be made in relation to the countries US and CA *
* Change number : #19889 - SAP: Invoice adaptation (high urgency) *
* Description : When in the Customer Master Data the account nr field *
* is filled then it should be shown on the invoice *
* And also changes has to be made for 'AR' and 'BR' *
* Change number : #22902 - Add invoice reference to DK/D1 *
* Change number : #24032 Wrong Invoice lay-out for AU15 *
* Description : When vkorg is AU15 and it is a Debit memo the header *
* should mention 'Tax Invoice" and not 'Debit Memo" *
* Change number : #25925 Changes made for new WIA invoice *
* Change number : #26987 - Project: Geographical Expansion phase 2 *
* Description : - The total amount should be shown in words. *
* - Original and Copy should be printed on the invoice. *
* Change number : #27370 SAP/AR - Specification on 2nd copy of billing *
* Description : - If table ZVKORGCOPY contains a correct entry. *
* Then the word 'Copy' should be printed on the *
* Description : When in the Customer Master Data the account nr field *
* KNB1-EIKTO is filled then it should be printed on the *
* invoice (earlier KNVV-EIKTO was used but htis field *
* Description : For WIA invoices a special tax text needs to be prin- *
* Description : Addition of currency for currencies without decimals *
* Description : Print BL number for automotive *
* Description : Problem with VAT percentage in Hungarian currency *
* Description : Price condition Handling Fee was not correct on the *
* Description : Use a tabel for tax texts *
* Description : change naming polish credit notes to from *
* Description : For InCar a new invoice has been created (Output ZD02)*
* Additional data had to be selected: *
* Description : For Places the footer text should be different per *
* country. The footer text must be maintained as *
* NL45_FOOTER_XX where XX is the delivering country *
* Description : Change text credit note for CZ15 *
* Description : Special logic for maintaining footer texts per *
* if not found, use standard text *
*& V A R I A B L E S D E C L A R A T I O N
lv_wia TYPE konv-mwsk1, "Tax code for WIA
lv_rate3 TYPE przn2, "Exchange rate with 3 dec
lv_fact1 TYPE tcurr-ffact, "Ratio for the "From" Currency Units
lv_fact2 TYPE tcurr-ffact, "Ratio for the "From" Currency Units
lv_text1 TYPE text1, "Own explanation payment term
*& T A B L E S D E C L A R A T I O N
DATA : lwa_condition TYPE t_conditions , "wa for conditions
li_string TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF vtopis, "int table for Information Structure for Installment Payment Terms
lwa_string TYPE vtopis, "wa for Information Structure for Installment Payment Terms
li_payment TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_payment, "int table for payment terms
lwa_payment TYPE t_payment, "wa for payment terms
lwa_shipment TYPE t_payment , "wa for payment terms
li_shipment TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_payment, "int table for payment terms
li_t052u TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t052u, "Internal table for own explanation payment term
*& C O N S T A N T S D E C L A R A T I O N
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_rate_text TYPE string VALUE 'Exchange Rate' , "Constant for Exchange Rate
lc_fr_f2 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_FR_F2' , "Constant for tax F2
lc_de_g3 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_DE_G3' , "Constant for tax G3
lc_it_i2 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_IT_I2' , "Constant for tax I2
lc_nl_no TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_NL_N0' , "Constant for tax N0
lc_nl_n3 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_NL_N3' , "Constant for tax N3
lc_nl_n4 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_NL_N4' , "Constant for tax N4
lc_nl_n5 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_NL_N5' , "Constant for tax N5
lc_nl_n6 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_NL_N6' , "Constant for tax N6
lc_nl_n9 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_NL_N9' , "Constant for tax N9
lc_fr_f5 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_FR_F5' , "Constant for tax F5
lc_fr_f7 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_FR_F7' , "Constant for tax F7
lc_de_g5 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_DE_G5' , "Constant for tax G5
lc_de_g7 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_DE_G7' , "Constant for tax G7
lc_gb_u5 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_GB_U5' , "Constant for tax U5
lc_es_e1 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_ES_E1' , "Constant for tax E1
lc_dk_d1 TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_EXEMPT_DK_D1' , "Constant for tax D1
lc_de_g5_wia TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_WIA_DE_G5', "Constant for WIA G5
lc_u5_wia TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_WIA_U5', "Constant for WIA U5
lc_n5_wia TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_WIA_N5', "Constant for WIA N5
lc_h5_wia TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_WIA_H5', "Constant for WIA H5
lc_s5_wia TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_WIA_S5', "Constant for WIA S5
lc_r5_wia TYPE string VALUE 'TAX_WIA_R5', "Constant for WIA R5
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_vat_amt TYPE string VALUE 'VAT Amount', "Constant for VAT amount
lc_head_m TYPE string VALUE 'M' , "Constant for M
lc_head_n TYPE string VALUE 'N' , "Constant for N
lc_head_au15 TYPE string VALUE 'AU15' , "Constant for AU15
lc_head_za15 TYPE string VALUE 'ZA15' , "Constant for ZA15 "+IVAR-FR203
lc_head_cz15 TYPE string VALUE 'CZ15' , "Constant for CZ15 "+RHO20110527
lc_head_nz15 TYPE string VALUE 'NZ15' , "Constant for NZ15 "+IVAR-FR203
lc_head_tr15 TYPE string VALUE 'TR15' , "Constant for TR15 "+IVAR-FR203
lc_head_pl15 TYPE string VALUE 'PL15' , "Constant for PL15 "+IVAR-FR203
lc_head_hu15 TYPE string VALUE 'HU15' , "Constant for HU15 "+#26987
lc_head_nl45 TYPE string VALUE 'NL45' , "Constant for NL45 "+RHO20110519
lc_head_o TYPE string VALUE 'O' , "Constant for O
lc_head_s TYPE string VALUE 'S' , "Constant for S
lc_head_p TYPE string VALUE 'P' , "Constant for P
lc_head_u TYPE string VALUE 'U' , "Constant for U
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_quan1 TYPE string VALUE 'Cond. Base Value', "Constant for Cond. Base Value
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_price1 TYPE string VALUE '% / Price' , "Constant for % / Price
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_rebate_claim TYPE string VALUE 'Credit Memo' , "Constant for Credit memo
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_price_text TYPE string VALUE 'Price' , "Constant for Price
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_quant_text TYPE string VALUE 'Quantity' , "Constant for Quantity
lc_fkart_re TYPE string VALUE 'RE' , "Constant for RE
lc_us10 TYPE string VALUE 'US10' , "Constant for US10
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_payment_terms TYPE string VALUE 'Payment terms' , "Constant for Payment terms
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_ship_method TYPE string VALUE 'Shipment method' , "Constant for Shipment method
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_tax_inv TYPE string VALUE 'Tax Invoice' , "Constant for Tax Invoice
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_inv TYPE string VALUE 'Invoice' , "Constant for Invoice
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_credit_memo TYPE string VALUE 'Credit Memo' , "Constant for Credit Memo
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_credit_canc TYPE string VALUE 'Credit Memo Cancellation' , "Constant for Credit Memo Cancellation
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_debit_memo TYPE string VALUE 'Debit Memo' , "Constant for Debit Memo
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_proforma_inv TYPE string VALUE 'Proforma Invoice' , "Constant for Proforma Invoice
lc_inter_inv TYPE string VALUE 'Intercompany Invoice' , "Constant for Inercompany Invoice
lc_intercredit_note TYPE string VALUE 'Intercompany Credit Note' , "Constant for Inercompany Credit Note
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_inv_cancel TYPE string VALUE 'Invoice Cancellation', "Constant for Invoice Cancellation
lc_d TYPE c VALUE 'D' , "Constant for D
lc_b1 TYPE char3 VALUE 'B1' , "Constant for B1
lc_b2 TYPE char3 VALUE 'B2' , "Constant for B2
lc_b3 TYPE char3 VALUE 'B3' , "Constant for B3
lc_b3e TYPE char3 VALUE 'B3E' , "Constant for B3E
lc_b1e TYPE char3 VALUE 'B1E' , "Constant for B1E
lc_b2e TYPE char3 VALUE 'B2E' , "Constant for B2E
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_itemtot TYPE string VALUE 'Items total', "Constant for Items total
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_finamt TYPE string VALUE 'Final amount', "Constant for Final amount
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_vat TYPE string VALUE 'Vat registration no', "Constant for Vat registration no
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_doccurr TYPE string VALUE 'Document currency', "Constant for Document currency
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_shipdate TYPE string VALUE 'Shipment date', "Constant for Shipment date
*-IVAR-FR203 lc_retdate TYPE string VALUE 'Return date', "Constant for Return date
lc_f2(2) TYPE c VALUE 'F2', "Constant for F2
lc_f5(2) TYPE c VALUE 'F5', "Constant for F5
lc_f7(2) TYPE c VALUE 'F7', "Constant for F7
lc_fr(2) TYPE c VALUE 'FR', "Constant for FR
lc_g3(2) TYPE c VALUE 'G3', "Constant for G3
lc_g5(2) TYPE c VALUE 'G5', "Constant for G5
lc_g7(2) TYPE c VALUE 'G7', "Constant for G7
lc_de(2) TYPE c VALUE 'DE', "Constant for DE
lc_gb(2) TYPE c VALUE 'GB', "Constant for GB
lc_u5(2) TYPE c VALUE 'U5', "Constant for U5
lc_n3(2) TYPE c VALUE 'N3', "Constant for N3
lc_n4(2) TYPE c VALUE 'N4', "Constant for N4
lc_n5(2) TYPE c VALUE 'N5', "Constant for N5
lc_n6(2) TYPE c VALUE 'N6', "Constant for N6
lc_n9(2) TYPE c VALUE 'N9', "Constant for N9
lc_i2(2) TYPE c VALUE 'I2', "Constant for I2
lc_it(2) TYPE c VALUE 'IT', "Constant for IT
lc_n0(2) TYPE c VALUE 'N0', "Constant for N0
lc_nl(2) TYPE c VALUE 'NL', "Constant for NL
lc_es(2) TYPE c VALUE 'ES', "Constant for ES
lc_e1(2) TYPE c VALUE 'E1', "Constant for E1
lc_dk(2) TYPE c VALUE 'DK', "Constant for DK
lc_d1(2) TYPE c VALUE 'D1', "Constant for D1
ltp_rate_text TYPE string, "Variable for Exchange Rate
ltp_vat_amt TYPE string, "Variable for VAT amount
ltp_quan1 TYPE string, "Variable for Cond. Base Value
ltp_rebate_claim TYPE string, "Variable for Credit memo
ltp_payment_terms TYPE string, "Variable for Payment terms
ltp_ship_method TYPE string, "Variable for Shipment method
ltp_tax_inv TYPE string, "Variable for Tax Invoice
ltp_credit_memo TYPE string, "Variable for Credit Memo
ltp_credit_canc TYPE string, "Variable for Credit Memo Cancellation
ltp_debit_memo TYPE string, "Variable for Debit Memo
ltp_proforma_inv TYPE string, "Variable for Proforma Invoice
ltp_inv_cancel TYPE string, "Variable for Invoice Cancellation
ltp_itemtot TYPE string, "Variable for Items total
ltp_finamt TYPE string, "Variable for Final amount
ltp_vat TYPE string, "Variable for Vat registration no
ltp_business_nr TYPE string, "Variable for Business Number "+IVAR27042009
ltp_doccurr TYPE string, "Variable for Document currency
ltp_shipdate TYPE string, "Variable for Shipment date
ltp_retdate TYPE string, "Variable for Return date
ltp_out_vat_reg_no TYPE string, "Variable for Our VAT registration number
ltp_original TYPE string, "Variable for Sub Heading "Original" "+#26987
ltp_copy TYPE string, "Variable for Sub Heading "Copy" "+#26987
DATA: IT_TEXT TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE.
DATA: WA_TEXT LIKE LINE OF IT_TEXT.
*- The perform below have been added because these Texts where hard-code
*- In this way this is more flexible
*- Determine the language in which the footer should be printed
** logic to fetch data from Customer master**
SELECT SINGLE stceg land1 FROM kna1 INTO (lv_stceg,lv_land1)
IF sy-subrc EQ 0 AND lv_stceg IS NOT INITIAL.
**logic to fetch data from Country Names**
SELECT SINGLE landx INTO gv_landx FROM t005t WHERE
*- Only for PL15 the description should be translated into polish.
*- Normally this should be done via above mentioned perform but the PL language
*- hasn't been imported into SAP so no translation could be made in SAP.
*- Only for PL15 the description should be translated into polish.
*- Normally this should be done via above mentioned perform but the PL language
*- hasn't been imported into SAP so no translation could be made in SAP.
CONCATENATE ltp_credit_memo '/Corrective tax document' INTO ltp_credit_memo.
*- Only for PL15 the description should be translated into polish.
*- Normally this should be done via above mentioned perform but the PL language
*- hasn't been imported into SAP so no translation could be made in SAP.
MOVE lv_price TO gv_price. "Display price heading
MOVE lv_quan TO gv_quan. "Display quan heading
* In S4, KONV is obsolete, so replaced the above code with the below call.
DATA : LS_KONV LIKE LINE OF LT_KONV.
LOOP AT LT_KONV INTO LS_KONV WHERE mwsk1 <> ' '.
* select tax text for WIA invoices
IF sy-subrc = 0 AND lv_ztaxtext IS NOT INITIAL.
** Replace next part with access to table
DATA : ls_konv1 like LINE OF lt_konv1.
LOOP AT lt_konv1 INTO ls_konv1 where mwsk1 <> ' '.
IF sy-subrc = 0 AND lv_ztaxtext IS NOT INITIAL.
* IF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_f2 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_fr .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_g3 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_de .
** ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ 'I1' AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ 'IT' . "NIT20080617d
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_i2 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_it . "NIT20080617i
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_e1 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_es . "EM #16375
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_d1 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_dk . "WB #22902
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_n0 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_n3 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_n4 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_n5 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_n6 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_n9 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_f5 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_f5 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_fr .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_f7 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_f7 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_fr .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_g5 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_g5 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_de .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_g7 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_g7 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_de .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_u5 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_nl .
* ELSEIF lv_mwsk1 EQ lc_u5 AND bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-landtx EQ lc_gb .
READ TABLE lwa_item_detail-conditions INTO lwa_item_condition WITH KEY kposn = lwa_item_detail-vbdpr-posnr
LOOP AT bil_prt_com-head_detail-conditions INTO lwa_conditions WHERE kbetr IS NOT INITIAL.
*- Only the first item was used for the VAT total and this was not correct
lv_rate = ABS( lv_rate ) . "Remove Negative values from local variable
**Finding the name of the ship to country**
**Finding the name of the sold to country**
IF lwa_conditions-kbetr IS NOT INITIAL AND lwa_conditions-koein = lc_per.
WRITE bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-netwr TO gv_netwr1 CURRENCY lwa_conditions-awein. "+IVAR20090320
WRITE lwa_conditions-kbetr TO gv_kbetr1 CURRENCY lwa_conditions-awein. "+IVAR-FR203
WRITE lwa_conditions-kawrt TO gv_kawrt1 right-justified decimals 0.
WRITE lwa_conditions-kawrt TO gv_kawrt1 CURRENCY lwa_conditions-awein.
WRITE lwa_conditions-kwert TO gv_kwert1 CURRENCY lwa_conditions-awein. "+IVAR-FR203.
WRITE lwa_conditions-kwert TO gv_kwert1 CURRENCY lwa_conditions-koei1. "+IVAR-24032010
WRITE ltp_grossvalue_wia TO gv_imgrossvalue CURRENCY lwa_conditions-awein. "+#25925
WRITE im_grossvalue TO gv_imgrossvalue CURRENCY lwa_conditions-awein. "+IVAR-FR203.
* Addition of currency for currencies without decimals
WRITE gv_amt TO gv_amt1 CURRENCY bil_prt_com-head_detail-tvko-waers.
*- Get corresponding Decriptions belonging to the Valuta
SELECT SINGLE * INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF lwa_ztcurt
SELECT SINGLE text1 FROM t052u INTO lv_text1 WHERE
IF bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-inco1_bez IS NOT INITIAL . "Move Shipment method to shipment table
SELECT SINGLE * INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF lst_kna1
IF bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-vbtyp EQ lc_head_m OR bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-vbtyp = lc_head_u OR bil_prt_com-head_detail-vbdkr-vbtyp = lc_head_5 .
*******In case of return move return text to shipment table***********
* INS RHO20111123 Add check if footer text is maintained per currency. The check is done on the following
* structure NL11_FOOTER_USD. If found that will be used as footer text, otherwise use standard
SELECT SINGLE TDNAME INTO lv_footertext_name FROM STXH WHERE TDOBJECT = 'TEXT' AND TDNAME = lv_footertext_name AND TDID = 'ADRS'.
* If found, use the footer text per currency, otherwise use standard
* INS RHO20110519 Determine footertext per country for TT Places
*- For WIA invoices only het "Final Amount" line should be displayed on the invoice.
DELETE gt_conditions WHERE vtext NE ltp_finamt.
*- Only for PL15 the description should be translated into polish.
*- Normally this should be done via above mentioned perform but the PL language
*- hasn't been imported into SAP so no translation could be made in SAP.
*- Determine the Sub Heading Titel only for PL15 and HU15
*- Check if the word 'Copy' should be printed.
SELECT SINGLE * INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF lwa_zvkorgcopy
IF lwa_zvkorgcopy-z_print_copy EQ 'X' AND tp_nr_of_copies GE 1.
*- Select External Identification of Delivery Note
**Code inserted for Deleting the leading zeros for POSNR FIELD " RajeshPadya
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
**Code ended for deleting leading zeros " RajeshPadya

FORMS.FPCLINE: FORM read_smartform_text_module USING u_smart_text TYPE tdsfname
READ TABLE lta_text INTO lwa_text INDEX 1.
FORM read_text USING export_text." changing gv_export_texts type string .
*& T Y P E S D E C L A R A T I O N
*& T A B L E S D E C L A R A T I O N
DATA it_text_lines TYPE TABLE OF lt_text_lines.
*& C O N S T A N T S D E C L A R A T I O N
